tasks.title: 3-DIMENSIONAL-MATCHING
tasks.statement: Given disjoint sets X, Y, Z and triples T subset of X x Y x Z, decide whether there is a matching of size q using pairwise disjoint triples.

tasks.title: 3-SAT
tasks.statement: Given a Boolean formula in 3-CNF, decide whether it is satisfiable.

tasks.title: 4-SAT
tasks.statement: Given a Boolean formula in 4-CNF, decide whether it is satisfiable.

tasks.title: BALANCED-BICLIQUE
tasks.statement: Given bipartite graph G and integer k, decide whether G contains K_{k,k} as a subgraph.

tasks.title: BIN-PACKING (decision)
tasks.statement: Given item sizes, bin capacity B, and integer k, decide whether all items can be packed into at most k bins.

tasks.title: CIRCUIT-SAT
tasks.statement: Given a Boolean circuit C, decide whether there exists an input assignment that makes C output 1.

tasks.title: CLIQUE
tasks.statement: Given an undirected graph G and integer k, decide whether G has a clique of size at least k.

tasks.title: CLIQUE-COVER
tasks.statement: Given a graph G and integer k, decide whether vertices of G can be partitioned into at most k cliques.

tasks.title: CONNECTED-DOMINATING-SET
tasks.statement: Given a graph G and integer k, decide whether G has a connected dominating set of size at most k.

tasks.title: CONNECTED-VERTEX-COVER
tasks.statement: Given a graph G and integer k, decide whether G has a vertex cover of size at most k that induces a connected subgraph.

tasks.title: CROSSING-NUMBER (decision)
tasks.statement: Given graph G and integer k, decide whether G can be drawn in the plane with at most k edge crossings.

tasks.title: CUTWIDTH
tasks.statement: Given graph G and integer k, decide whether vertices can be linearly ordered so every cut has at most k crossing edges.

tasks.title: DIRECTED-HAMILTONIAN-CYCLE
tasks.statement: Given a directed graph G, decide whether G contains a directed Hamiltonian cycle.

tasks.title: DIRECTED-HAMILTONIAN-PATH
tasks.statement: Given a directed graph G, decide whether G contains a directed Hamiltonian path.

tasks.title: DOMINATING-SET
tasks.statement: Given a graph G and integer k, decide whether G has a dominating set of size at most k.

tasks.title: EDGE-COLORING (decision)
tasks.statement: Given a graph G and integer k >= 3, decide whether edges of G can be properly colored with at most k colors.

tasks.title: EDGE-DOMINATING-SET
tasks.statement: Given a graph G and integer k, decide whether G has an edge dominating set of size at most k.

tasks.title: EXACT-COVER
tasks.statement: Given universe U and family S of subsets, decide whether there exists a subfamily that covers each element of U exactly once.

tasks.title: EXACT-SAT
tasks.statement: Given a CNF formula, decide whether there exists an assignment such that each clause has exactly one true literal.

tasks.title: FEEDBACK-ARC-SET
tasks.statement: Given a directed graph G and integer k, decide whether at most k arcs can be removed so the graph becomes acyclic.

tasks.title: FEEDBACK-VERTEX-SET
tasks.statement: Given a graph G and integer k, decide whether one can delete at most k vertices so the remaining graph is acyclic.

tasks.title: GRAPH-BANDWIDTH
tasks.statement: Given graph G and integer b, decide whether vertices can be labeled so each edge spans labels differing by at most b.

tasks.title: HAMILTONIAN-CYCLE
tasks.statement: Given a graph G, decide whether G contains a Hamiltonian cycle.

tasks.title: HAMILTONIAN-PATH
tasks.statement: Given a graph G, decide whether G contains a Hamiltonian path.

tasks.title: HITTING-SET
tasks.statement: Given a universe U, family S of subsets, and integer k, decide whether there is a size-k subset of U intersecting every set in S.

tasks.title: 0-1-INTEGER-LINEAR-PROGRAMMING-FEASIBILITY
tasks.statement: Given linear constraints over binary variables, decide whether there exists a 0-1 assignment satisfying all constraints.

tasks.title: INDEPENDENT-SET
tasks.statement: Given an undirected graph G and integer k, decide whether G has an independent set of size at least k.

tasks.title: JOB-SHOP-SCHEDULING (decision)
tasks.statement: Given jobs with machine-specific operation orders and makespan bound B, decide whether a feasible schedule of length at most B exists.

tasks.title: k-COLORABILITY
tasks.statement: Given a graph G and integer k >= 3, decide whether G is properly colorable with at most k colors.

tasks.title: KNAPSACK (decision)
tasks.statement: Given item weights and values plus bounds W and V, decide whether there exists a subset with total weight at most W and value at least V.

tasks.title: LINEAR-ORDERING (decision)
tasks.statement: Given a weighted directed graph and bound B, decide whether there is a vertex ordering with total forward weight at least B.

tasks.title: LONGEST-CYCLE (decision)
tasks.statement: Given graph G and integer k, decide whether G contains a simple cycle of length at least k.

tasks.title: LONGEST-PATH (decision)
tasks.statement: Given a graph G and integer k, decide whether G has a simple path with at least k edges.

tasks.title: MAX-2SAT (decision)
tasks.statement: Given a 2-CNF formula and integer K, decide whether at least K clauses can be satisfied.

tasks.title: MAX-CUT (decision)
tasks.statement: Given a graph G and integer B, decide whether G has a cut with at least B crossing edges.

tasks.title: MAX-SAT (decision)
tasks.statement: Given CNF formula phi and integer K, decide whether at least K clauses of phi can be satisfied simultaneously.

tasks.title: MINIMUM-FILL-IN
tasks.statement: Given graph G and integer k, decide whether at most k edges can be added to make G chordal.

tasks.title: MONOTONE-NAE-3SAT
tasks.statement: Given a 3-CNF formula with only positive literals, decide whether each clause has at least one true and at least one false literal.

tasks.title: MONOTONE-ONE-IN-THREE-SAT
tasks.statement: Given a 3-CNF formula with only positive literals, decide whether each clause can have exactly one true literal.

tasks.title: MULTIPROCESSOR-SCHEDULING (decision)
tasks.statement: Given processing times, number of identical machines m, and bound B, decide whether all jobs can be scheduled with makespan at most B.

tasks.title: NAE-3SAT
tasks.statement: Given a 3-CNF formula, decide whether there is an assignment where each clause has at least one true and at least one false literal.

tasks.title: ONE-IN-THREE-SAT
tasks.statement: Given a 3-CNF formula, decide whether there exists an assignment making exactly one literal true in every clause.

tasks.title: PARTITION
tasks.statement: Given a multiset of positive integers, decide whether it can be partitioned into two subsets with equal sum.

tasks.title: PARTITION-INTO-TRIANGLES
tasks.statement: Given graph G, decide whether vertices can be partitioned into disjoint triangles.

tasks.title: PATHWIDTH (decision)
tasks.statement: Given graph G and integer k, decide whether G has pathwidth at most k.

tasks.title: PLANAR-3SAT
tasks.statement: Given a planar 3-CNF incidence structure, decide whether the formula is satisfiable.

tasks.title: QUADRATIC-ASSIGNMENT (decision)
tasks.statement: Given flow and distance matrices and bound B, decide whether an assignment of facilities to locations has total cost at most B.

tasks.title: SAT
tasks.statement: Given a Boolean formula phi, decide whether phi is satisfiable.

tasks.title: SET-COVER
tasks.statement: Given universe U, family S of subsets of U, and integer k, decide whether there is a subfamily of size at most k covering U.

tasks.title: SET-PACKING
tasks.statement: Given a family of sets and integer k, decide whether there exist at least k pairwise disjoint sets.

tasks.title: SET-SPLITTING
tasks.statement: Given universe U and family S of subsets, decide whether U can be partitioned into two parts so every set in S intersects both parts.

tasks.title: SHORTEST-COMMON-SUPERSEQUENCE (decision)
tasks.statement: Given a set of strings and integer L, decide whether there exists a common supersequence of length at most L.

tasks.title: STEINER-TREE (decision)
tasks.statement: Given a weighted graph, terminal set R, and bound B, decide whether there is a tree spanning all terminals with total weight at most B.

tasks.title: SUBGRAPH-ISOMORPHISM
tasks.statement: Given graphs G and H, decide whether G contains a subgraph isomorphic to H.

tasks.title: SUBSET-SUM
tasks.statement: Given integers a1..an and target T, decide whether some subset sums exactly to T.

tasks.title: 3-PARTITION
tasks.statement: Given 3m integers and bound B, decide whether they can be partitioned into m triples each summing exactly to B.

tasks.title: TREEWIDTH (decision)
tasks.statement: Given graph G and integer k, decide whether G has treewidth at most k.

tasks.title: TSP (decision)
tasks.statement: Given a weighted complete graph and bound B, decide whether there is a tour of total weight at most B.

tasks.title: VERTEX-COVER
tasks.statement: Given an undirected graph G and integer k, decide whether G has a vertex cover of size at most k.

tasks.title: EXACT-COVER-BY-3-SETS
tasks.statement: Given a universe U with |U| = 3q and a family of 3-element subsets, decide whether there is an exact cover of U with q subsets.
